description: This file provides functions for runtime-safe schema self-healing in a MySQL database. It includes methods to check for the presence of tables, columns, and indexes, and to add missing columns and indexes for specific tables ('persona_drafts' and 'persona_final'). The main exported function 'ensureMysqlSchemaCompatible' verifies database engine compatibility, checks for the existence of required tables and columns, and attempts to add missing schema elements while handling errors gracefully.

methods.name: _mysqlHasColumn(tableName, columnName)
methods.description: Checks if a specific column exists in a given table by querying the information_schema.columns.

methods.name: _mysqlHasIndex(tableName, indexName)
methods.description: Checks if a specific index exists in a given table by querying the information_schema.statistics.

methods.name: _mysqlHasTable(tableName)
methods.description: Checks if a specific table exists in the current database by querying information_schema.tables.

methods.name: _ensurePersonaDraftsPersonaIdColumnMysql()
methods.description: Ensures the 'persona_id' column and its index exist in the 'persona_drafts' table, adding them if missing.

methods.name: _ensurePersonaFinalPersonaIdColumnMysql()
methods.description: Ensures the 'persona_id' column and its index exist in the 'persona_final' table, adding them if missing.

methods.name: ensureMysqlSchemaCompatible()
methods.description: Main exported function that performs schema compatibility checks and repairs for MySQL, returning an object with details of actions attempted and applied.
